meaning: 螳ｫ蟠纂譌･譛ｬ荵晏ｷ槫ｲ帑ｸ懷漉蟯ｸ貂ｯ蟶﹅
examples: Because of his achievements, Miyazaki is considered the best animated director, perhaps of all the time.
It's no surprise to learn that Miyazaki designed the building.
Miyazaki characters are everywhere. Kiki on her broom, a masked ghost from Spirited Away.
News that creator Hidetaka Miyazaki was not directing the sequel only made matters worse.
And Miyazaki springs surprises that capture the otherworldliness of aviation better than almost any live-action film.
